prompt: A photorealistic full-body street portrait of a stylish young man standing on an urban sidewalk in front of a grand historic stone building with tall columns, arched windows, and classical architectural detailing. He is centered in the frame, standing with arms crossed, body angled slightly to the side, looking away from the camera. His face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. He has neatly groomed dark brown hair, thick and swept back with volume. He wears a fitted navy blue zip-up knit jacket over a matching dark turtleneck, a silver wristwatch with a light dial, and crisp white trousers. Parked along the curb behind him are exactly 2 vehicles: a silver hatchback on the left and a black off-road SUV with a rear-mounted spare tire on the right. The composition is vertical, fashion-editorial, and slightly shallow depth of field, with the man sharply in focus and the cars and architecture softly blurred. Lighting is soft natural daylight under an overcast sky, with muted tones, realistic skin and fabric texture, subtle luxury menswear styling, clean city atmosphere, and high-end lifestyle photography aesthetics.
